mapper.select: SELECT wq.*, q.question_content, q.question_type, q.options, q.knowledge_point, s.subject_name FROM wrong_question wq LEFT JOIN question q ON wq.question_id = q.question_id LEFT JOIN subject s ON wq.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE wq.student_id = #{studentId} ORDER BY wq.last_wrong_time DESC

SELECT wq.*, q.question_content, q.question_type, q.options, q.knowledge_point, s.subject_name FROM wrong_question wq LEFT JOIN question q ON wq.question_id = q.question_id LEFT JOIN subject s ON wq.subject_id = s.subject_id WHERE wq.student_id = #{studentId} AND wq.subject_id = #{subjectId} ORDER BY wq.last_wrong_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO wrong_question (student_id, question_id, student_answer, correct_answer, subject_id, wrong_count, last_wrong_time) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{questionId}, #{studentAnswer}, #{correctAnswer}, #{subjectId}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE wrong_question SET student_answer = #{studentAnswer}, correct_answer = #{correctAnswer}, subject_id = #{subjectId}, wrong_count = #{wrongCount}, last_wrong_time = NOW() WHERE wrong_id = #{wrongId}
UPDATE wrong_question SET wrong_count = wrong_count + 1, last_wrong_time = NOW() WHERE wrong_id = #{wrongId}
